gate_question: Does this exact current protocol, with current live state, allow an unprivileged attacker to extract funds or rewards beyond entitlement?

candidate.title_or_claim: Reentrancy via V3 mint callback during bonding-curve-to-DEX migration allows bonding-curve buy after migration is triggered
candidate.claimed_root_cause: No reentrancy guard on swapExactInput; _getSwapImplementation reads live _packedTokenStates before _setTokenStatus(DEX) is written inside PORTAL_TRADE_V2 delegatecall; V3 pool mint callback re-enters Portal at stale Tradable status
candidate.claimed_impact: Attacker acquires launched tokens at bonding-curve price after migration reserve has been (partially) committed to the DEX migrator, extracting tokens beyond entitlement

live_preconditions.name: live_tradable_token_near_dex_thresh
live_preconditions.observed_value: Protocol is active with 1361 BNB on proxy; specific token address with circulatingSupply near dexSupplyThresh not enumerated from live_context

live_preconditions.name: portal_trade_v2_address
live_preconditions.observed_value: PORTAL_TRADE_V2 is an immutable set at construction time; address not in live_context snapshot

live_preconditions.name: portal_trade_v2_source_ordering
live_preconditions.observed_value: PORTAL_TRADE_V2 source not present in repository; ordering of _setTokenStatus(DEX) vs external V3 pool mint() call is unknown
live_preconditions.command_if_missing: Decompile or obtain verified source of PORTAL_TRADE_V2 implementation address from BSCScan; search for _setTokenStatus call site relative to external pool.mint() call in migration path

live_preconditions.name: portal_v3_mint_callback_dispatch
live_preconditions.observed_value: Portal.sol imports IUniswapV3MintCallback and IPancakeV3MintCallback (L24-25) but does NOT implement uniswapV3MintCallback or pancakeV3MintCallback in any src/**/*.sol file; no fallback function in Portal.sol; source-artifacts/metadata-standard-input.json contains 9 matches for these callbacks suggesting implementation exists in a non-indexed facet (likely PORTAL_TRADE_V2)
live_preconditions.command_if_missing: cast 4byte-decode $(cast sig 'uniswapV3MintCallback(uint256,uint256,bytes)') and verify Portal proxy ABI includes this selector; check if Portal has a fallback that routes to PORTAL_TRADE_V2

source_code_basis.why_it_matters: Entry point for the attack; no reentrancy guard; calls _getSwapImplementation then _delegateToImpl with no mutex
Reads live _packedTokenStates storage at call time; if status is still Tradable during re-entrant call, routes to PORTAL_TRADE_V2 (bonding curve) instead of PORTAL_DEX_ROUTER
Plain storage write with no mutex; provides no mutual-exclusion guarantee; if called after external mint() in PORTAL_TRADE_V2, re-entrant call sees stale Tradable status
Portal accepts plain ETH; combined with absent reentrancy guard, any ETH-sending callback can re-enter

Portal imports IUniswapV3MintCallback and IPancakeV3MintCallback but does NOT declare them in its inheritance list and does NOT implement the callback functions in any src/**/*.sol file; the actual callback handler location (PORTAL_TRADE_V2 or elsewhere) is unconfirmed from available source

attacker_path.actor: Unprivileged EOA or contract controlling a V3/PCS mint callback receiver
attacker_inputs: swapExactInput call sized to push circulatingSupply >= dexSupplyThresh for a Tradable token
Attacker-controlled contract registered as liquidity recipient or callback target during migration mint()
call_sequence: 1. Attacker calls Portal.swapExactInput (buy) with amount crossing dexSupplyThresh
2. Portal delegates to PORTAL_TRADE_V2 via delegatecall
3. PORTAL_TRADE_V2 triggers migration; calls external V3 pool mint() BEFORE calling _setTokenStatus(DEX) [ordering unconfirmed]
4. V3 pool issues uniswapV3MintCallback / pancakeV3MintCallback to Portal address
5. Portal dispatches callback (mechanism unconfirmed — no fallback or callback handler visible in src/**/*.sol)
6. Re-entrant swapExactInput executes; _getSwapImplementation reads _packedTokenStates: status still Tradable → routes to PORTAL_TRADE_V2
7. Re-entrant bonding-curve buy executes against reserve already partially committed to migrator
8. Attacker receives tokens at stale bonding-curve price
state_before: Portal holds BNB reserve for the token
state_after: Attacker holds tokens acquired at bonding-curve price after migration reserve was committed

extraction_analysis.asset_or_reward: Launched ERC-20 tokens and/or BNB reserve
extraction_analysis.attacker_gain: Tokens acquired at bonding-curve price against a reserve already partially or fully committed to the DEX migrator
extraction_analysis.victim_or_protocol_loss: Portal BNB reserve and/or token supply integrity; DEX pool receives less liquidity than expected
extraction_analysis.why_gain_exceeds_entitlement: Bonding-curve buys are not valid after migration is triggered; the invariant is that no bonding-curve trades occur once migration begins; attacker bypasses this by exploiting the window between external mint() and _setTokenStatus(DEX) write

setup: Fork BSC at block 108382650 using proxy 0xe2ce6ab80874fa9fa2aae65d277dd6b8e65c9de0
Resolve PORTAL_TRADE_V2 immutable address from implementation storage
Obtain or decompile PORTAL_TRADE_V2 source to confirm ordering of _setTokenStatus(DEX) vs external pool.mint()
Confirm Portal dispatches uniswapV3MintCallback / pancakeV3MintCallback (check for fallback or ABI selector match)
Identify or deploy a Tradable token with circulatingSupply at dexSupplyThresh - 1 token
Deploy MaliciousMigrator that re-enters swapExactInput on Portal during mint callback
transaction_sequence: attacker.swapExactInput({inputToken: BNB, outputToken: targetToken, inputAmount: threshold_crossing_amount})
Inside delegatecall to PORTAL_TRADE_V2: migration triggered, external pool.mint() called
V3 pool calls uniswapV3MintCallback on Portal address
Re-entrant attacker.swapExactInput({inputToken: BNB, outputToken: targetToken, inputAmount: X})
expected_assertions: If vulnerable: re-entrant swapExactInput succeeds; attacker.tokenBalance > 0 from re-entrant call; final token.status == DEX
If protected by ordering: re-entrant swapExactInput routes to PORTAL_DEX_ROUTER (unfunded pool) and reverts
If callback not dispatched: uniswapV3MintCallback call to Portal reverts, outer migration reverts, attack not viable
local_proof_required.reject_if_assertion_fails: If PORTAL_TRADE_V2 calls _setTokenStatus(DEX) before any external call, OR if Portal does not dispatch uniswapV3MintCallback/pancakeV3MintCallback to any handler, the re-entrant path is blocked and the finding must be REJECT

rejection_reason: Not rejected: structural conditions confirmed in available source (no reentrancy guard, routing reads live storage, _setTokenStatus is a plain write). Two blocking unknowns prevent promotion to HIGH_CONFIDENCE_CANDIDATE: (1) PORTAL_TRADE_V2 source is absent from this repository — the ordering of _setTokenStatus(DEX) vs external pool.mint() is the decisive gate; (2) Portal.sol imports IUniswapV3MintCallback and IPancakeV3MintCallback but implements neither callback function in any src/**/*.sol file and has no fallback dispatcher — the mechanism by which Portal would handle a V3 mint callback re-entry is unconfirmed from available source. Both unknowns must be resolved by local fork test before this candidate can be promoted or rejected.
